channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian parents, two children, in West Bank
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israeli forces kill 16 more in Gaza, occupied West Bank
- Israeli attacks kill 13 in Gaza, including 2 children and a pregnant woman
- Israeli strikes killed 12 in Gaza, including 2 children and a pregnant woman
- 4 Palestinians Killed When Israeli Forces Open Fire on West Bank Family
- Israeli Forces Kill 16 People In Gaza And The West Bank, Medics Say
- 4 Palestinians Killed When Israeli Forces Open Fire on West Bank Family
- Israeli troops kill 4 in Palestinian family in West Bank
- Israeli forces kill 16 people in Gaza and the West Bank, medics say
- Israeli forces kill two children and their parents in West Bank
- Israeli troops kill Palestinian family of 4 in West Bank
- 8 killed by Israeli airstrike on police vehicle in C. Gaza
- Urgent: 8 killed by Israeli airstrike on police vehicle in Gaza
- Hospital officials say an Israeli strike killed 4 in Gaza, including 2 children and a pregnant woman
- Israeli drone strike kills 4 Gazans, including 2 children
- Israeli forces kill Palestinian couple and two of their children in occupied West Bank
- 4 Palestinians killed by Israeli forces in West Bank: Red Crescent
- Hospital officials say an Israeli strike killed 4 in Gaza, including a child and his pregnant mother
- Israeli forces kill Palestinian family of four in West Bank, Palestinian Health Authorities say
- Israeli forces kill four Palestinians in West Bank, Palestinian health authorities say
- Israeli forces kill four Palestinians in West Bank, Palestinian health authorities say]]>

item.title: Trump says US not ready to agree deal to end Iran war
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Middle East war live: Trump says 'we're talking' to Iran but it's not 'ready' for deal to end war
- Iran war live: Tehran rejects Trump claim on talks; fire near Dubai airport
- Iran-Israel war LIVE: Trump says 'we're talking' to Iran but it's not 'ready' for deal to end war
- Trump says Iran eager for talks despite denial from Tehran
- Trump leaves allies and foes guessing on endgame for Iran
- Trump says 'we're talking' to Iran but it's not 'ready' for deal to end war
- US not ready to announce end of operation against Iran yet — Trump
- Iran Wants Cease-Fire Deal but Terms Aren’t Good Enough, Trump Says
- Iran denies asking for ceasefire after Trump says it wants deal
- US not ready to seek deal to end war with Iran, Donald Trump says
- Trump says U.S. not ready to agree deal to end Iran war
- Trump says he is not ready to strike deal with Iran
- Trump says not ready to make Iran deal 'because terms aren’t good enough'
- Trump says he is not satisfied by terms of possible deal with Iran
- Trump says Iran's terms "not good enough" for ceasefire deal
- Trump says Iran’s terms ‘not good enough’ for ceasefire deal]]>

- Fifth member of Iranian women's soccer team withdraws Australia asylum offer
- Fifth Iranian football player leaves Australia after initially accepting offer of asylum

- Iran says women's soccer captain drops Australia asylum bid
